data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 9a819c733b5e verified on main. CI green (Changesets failure is pre-existing/non-blocking). Change is test-only: 38 lines added to memory-manager-commands-coverage.test.ts with 5 new rollbackBeatState test cases (beads backend, exec errors, special chars, empty/undefined reason). No invariants to verify. No regressions.
